$schema_comment: Course facts for the Sombrero Half Marathon (Santa Clarita). Loop course out of Heritage Park along the Santa Clara River. Curated phase + landmark labels — synthesized first pass; replace expected_facts and add primary-source citations once the course's official site is verified.

race.name: Sombrero Half Marathon
race.description: Loop half marathon through Santa Clarita's Newhall Ranch / Santa Clara River corridor, starting and finishing at Heritage Park.

sources.title: Sombrero Half Marathon SC — MapMyRun route export

phases.label: Opening miles
phases.note: Flat across Heritage Park. Crowded, easy to run too fast — clock goal pace, don't chase. It's a tune-up.

phases.label: Rolling approach
phases.note: Neighborhood rollers leading to the day's high point. Effort over pace. Sip on every uphill, drink at the top of every down.

phases.label: Peak push
phases.note: The day's biggest pull, mid-course. Shorten stride, lift cadence, breathe. Crest it and the rest is downhill — don't blow it on the way up.

phases.label: Cruise miles
phases.note: Net downhill back toward Newhall Ranch Rd. Don't hammer — save the quads for the last mile. Gels at 7 and 10.

phases.label: Final push
phases.note: Heritage Park is close. Empty the tank from mile 12. It's a tune-up but finish like you mean it.

elevation_source.reason: Total gain of 283 ft per MapMyRun's elevation widget (start 1119 ft / max 1246 ft). Bundled GPX has no native elevation — enriched via SRTM 30m DEM, smoothed, then linearly rescaled to MapMyRun's anchor values.

warnings.fact_drift: Race-day course details (aid stations, exact start corral) not yet verified against the official Santa Clarita Runners race bible. Re-verify before relying on landmarks. Schema flag: re-verify when verified_at is older than 60 days.
warnings.gpx_source: designs/sample-sombrero.gpx is the bundled course track — derived from MapMyRun route 6309568135 with SRTM 30m elevation enrichment. Replace with a Garmin recording from race day for v2.
